bug.actual_behavior: Round 1 generated a valid PNG, but round 2 image-to-image edit failed at the gpt-image-2 edits job endpoint with HTTP 400 Malformed JSON request body, aborting the run before final result metadata was written.
evidence: HTTP 400 Bad Request: Malformed JSON request body from gpt-image-2 edits endpoint during round 2.
bug.expected_behavior: When round 1 does not pass heuristic evaluation, auto-draw-plot should use the previous PNG as a reference and complete the next gpt-image-2 image edit round or report a provider-specific unsupported edit mode cleanly.
bug.impact: 这是由 skill 设计缺陷导致的真实环境问题，需要纳入后续修复闭环。
reproduction_steps: Run auto-draw-plot in schematic mode with gpt-image-2 and max_rounds greater than 1.
Allow round 1 to complete and trigger round 2 image-to-image editing using the previous output PNG as reference.
bug.summary: gpt-image-2 image-to-image round fails with malformed JSON request body
bug.workaround: Use the valid round-01 output as final when acceptable, or rerun with max_rounds=1 to avoid the edit endpoint.
